details.redacted_summary: - 云端 LiClaw/OpenClaw 申请的飞书机器人不要混用（高明达 2026-06-09 校正口径）。核心思想：飞书机器人不要与其他程序/工具复用；包括 Claude Code 调用飞书 CLI 配置飞书信息、本地搭建其他 agent 工具等；混用会导致机器人不回复、重复回复等棘手问题。对外表达要先讲核心结论，避免绕。 - For ordinary chat or messages outside the defined trigger scenarios, stay silent. - If 高明达 / ou_d8d4047e9083cc44527a2429b4f757a4 is already participating in a topic, do not intervene in that topic unless directly asked/mentioned. ## Group Behavior Rule: oc_97951f2a5226dafe0decf5592d4e2726 - In this Feishu group, do not join the conversation unless explicitly @mentioned. - If not @mentioned, reply exactly `NO_REPLY`, even if the topic is related to cars, OpenClaw, or something the assistant could comment on. - This was a direct user instruction on 2026-05-20 after the assistant over-participated.

triage.rationale: Team-channel operational guidance includes an identifiable individual and internal bot/group behavior instructions; IDs are partly redacted but remaining personal/team context should not auto-release as personal experience.
suggested_redactions: Redact the named individual to a role or generic label.
Generalize specific dates to approximate timeframes or remove them.
Remove or generalize internal source references, hashes, and channel/group identifiers.
Summarize bot behavior rules without exposing team-specific participation instructions.
triage.release_summary: A messaging-platform bot integration was clarified to avoid reusing the same bot identity or configuration across unrelated tools and agents. Reuse can cause unreliable behavior such as missed responses or duplicate replies. The expected bot behavior is to stay silent outside explicit trigger conditions and respond only when directly invoked, with verification based on the bot no longer over-participating or producing duplicate/missing replies.
triage.reusable_lesson: Use dedicated bot identities/configurations per tool and enforce explicit invocation rules to prevent noisy or unreliable bot behavior.
